title: Rules of origin under the Developing Countries Trading Scheme (DCTS) are improving
body: "The UK government is updating the rules of origin under the DCTS to make it easier for developing countries to export to the UK.  This guidance sets out upcoming changes to rules of origin under the Developing Countries Trading Scheme (DCTS), expected to take effect in early 2026.   Check back to the DCTS Trading with Developing Nations main page for more information and updated guidance nearer the time.   "

taxons.title: UK Trade Tariff and classification of goods
